mapper.sql: id, stat_key, stat_value, data_type, time_value, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dashboard_stats WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM dashboard_stats WHERE stat_key = #{statKey} AND deleted = 0 AND time_value IS NULL

SELECT
FROM dashboard_stats WHERE data_type = #{dataType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY time_value DESC

SELECT
FROM dashboard_stats WHERE stat_key = #{statKey} AND data_type = 'trend' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY time_value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_stats ( stat_key, stat_value, data_type, time_value, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{statKey}, #{statValue}, #{dataType}, #{timeValue}, NOW(), NOW(), #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_stats SET stat_key = #{statKey}, stat_value = #{statValue}, data_type = #{dataType}, time_value = #{timeValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dashboard_stats SET stat_value = #{statValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE stat_key = #{statKey} AND deleted = 0 AND time_value IS NULL
UPDATE dashboard_stats SET stat_value = #{statValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE stat_key = #{statKey} AND time_value = #{timeValue} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dashboard_stats SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dashboard_stats SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE stat_key = #{statKey} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dashboard_stats SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE data_type = 'trend' AND time_value < #{timeValue} AND deleted = 0
